aesthetic: Premium Interactive Philosophical Ebook Microsite, Cinematic Editorial, Netflix Documentary style, Time Magazine cover feel.

hierarchy.h1: font-heading text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-[10vw] leading-[0.9] tracking-tight uppercase
hierarchy.h2: font-heading text-4xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl leading-tight tracking-tight uppercase
hierarchy.quote: font-quote text-2xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl italic leading-relaxed
hierarchy.overline: font-body text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-accent-gold

layout.container: w-full max-w-[1400px] mx-auto px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24
layout.grid_system: Bento grid, asymmetric framing, use heavy negative space. Avoid traditional symmetrical 2-column layouts.

buttons.primary: bg-accent-gold text-black font-heading uppercase text-xl tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-accent-gold text-accent-gold font-heading uppercase text-xl tracking-widest px-8 py-4 hover:bg-accent-gold hover:text-black transition-colors duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-primary font-body uppercase text-sm tracking-[0.1em] hover:text-accent-gold transition-colors duration-300

cards.glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] p-8
cards.editorial: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-l-2 border-accent-red-dark p-8 md:p-12 hover:border-accent-gold transition-colors duration-500
cards.pricing_gold: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-accent-gold shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(197,160,89,0.1)] p-10 relative overflow-hidden

components.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 transition-all duration-300
components.floating_whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center
components.chat_panel: glassmorphism container with dark semi-transparent background, thin borders, and monospace/sans-serif AI text inside

effects.grain_overlay: Fixed positioned div with pointer-events-none covering the screen, using SVG noise filter, opacity 0.05
effects.glow: Radial gradient blobs placed strategically behind sections to add cinematic depth (red or gold)
effects.parallax: Use CSS or framer-motion to make images scroll slower than the page text
effects.transitions: Smooth fade-ins and slow upward translations for text blocks

sections_guide.hero: Fullscreen height, dark cosmic city cover background, Bebas Neue gigantic headline, subtle scrolling chapter titles floating in the background.
sections_guide.paradoks_anto: Split-screen layout. Left side: Moon phase/rich context. Right side: eclipse/rain/poor context. Brutalist typography overlay.
sections_guide.elon_musk_paradox: Split horizontal or vertical layout comparing Texas prefab house with Mega Mansion. High contrast, luxury editorial layout.
sections_guide.abdurrahman_bin_auf: Historical shift. Deep warm lighting, Madinah market background, prominent serif quote.
sections_guide.ai_reflection_assistant: Interactive glassmorphism chat interface. AI responds philosophically. Red glow background.
sections_guide.isi_bab: Horizontal scrolling carousel of 11 cards. Each card is an 'intellectual archive' with paper texture.
sections_guide.bab_1_gratis: Immersive reader mode. Clean, distraction-free, focused on typography. Off-white text on dark paper background.
sections_guide.pricing: 3 tiers. First tier: Free (minimal). Second tier: Traktir Kopi 10k. Third tier: Full Book 75k (Gold highlighted card).
sections_guide.marshmallow_effect: Moody dramatic photography of marshmallow. Focus on delayed gratification narrative.
sections_guide.testimonials: Editorial quotes block. Large serif quotation marks, high contrast.
sections_guide.final_cta: Fullscreen dark starry sky, glowing horizon. Gigantic CTA button to buy.
sections_guide.checkout_mock: Clean, highly secure looking, dark mode payment form with trust badges.
sections_guide.success_page: Cinematic thank you page with direct download links, golden accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Do NOT use typical SaaS or generic e-commerce templates. Layouts must feel like a high-end digital editorial.
Fonts requested: Bebas Neue (heading), Cormorant Garamond (quotes), Manrope (body). Map these in Tailwind config.
Implement a global fixed grain noise layer on top of the app using a transparent SVG pattern.
Build a custom sticky navbar and floating WhatsApp component (use lucide-react icons).
Provide a simulated mock checkout page and a success page inside the App routing (react-router-dom or state-based switching).
Build the AI Chat Panel section with a mockup chat interface using glassmorphism.
Include horizontal scroll logic for the 11 Chapters section.
